summary: A journey hero is paired with one gate, drop-off, or funnel-like proof device that highlights where conversion or confidence breaks down.
composition_pattern: journey hero with a gate/funnel support cue and lower friction row
support_structure: lower friction row tied to critical stages
one side or embedded funnel/gate proof cue
when_to_use: One break point or drop-off matters strongly in the story
The page needs more than sequence; it needs a visible decision gate
avoid_when: The page has no real conversion or gate logic
The customer story is better told by personas plus insight column
